description: Subject 10 — Plan rescheduling within the constrained workout library. Athlete needs to move a workout because of a schedule conflict (travel, work, life event). The AI MUST select replacement workouts from the WORKOUT_CODES_BY_DAY library (no inventing custom workouts), MUST NOT move race day, MUST preserve hard/easy alternation, and SHOULD prioritize keeping quality sessions over easy runs. The output must be valid JSON containing only the workouts that changed.
input:
__FILL_IN_RESCHEDULE_REQUEST__

Coach guidance for writing this input: a JSON-shaped reschedule request matching what the production reschedule-plan function sends. Includes: current_schedule (workouts with codes/dates/statuses), reason (schedule_conflict | injury | fatigue | life_event), scope (single_day | this_week | remaining_plan), recent_training (what they actually completed). The simplest valuable case: a runner needs to swap Tuesday tempo with Saturday long run because of a wedding on Saturday. Note: for live-record to work, the workoutCodesByDay var above needs to be filled with the actual library — easier to populate from the production source than write by hand. Talk to me when you want to record this one and I'll wire it up.

forbidden_patterns: (?i)\b(custom workout|new workout I designed|let me create)\b
